Home / Scheduling & Calendars / Rallly

Rallly — open source alternative

Open source Doodle-style meeting poll.

Strengths

  • Focused scope — just find a meeting time.
  • Clean UI and fast.
  • Simple docker deploy.

Weaknesses

  • Not a full booking product.
  • No recurring event support.
  • Limited integrations.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Rallly is used as an alternative to

Calendly

Appointment scheduling and meeting links.

See all alternatives →
